Headline: Financial - David Ross Education Trust (State), National
Info: The David Ross Education Trust, which operates 36 academies, is preparing to make staffing changes and redundancies across a third of its schools due to severe financial pressures caused by falling pupil numbers.

Headline: Financial - Various Sixth Forms (State), National
Info: State sixth form leaders have warned that a lower-than-expected 0.5 per cent funding increase will threaten their ability to offer a broad range of subjects and hold down class sizes, representing an 18 per cent real-terms cut since 2010.
